title: Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Kheoni is a wildlife sanctuary located in Kannod Tehsil of Dewas district and parts of the Sehore district of Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: Kheoni is a wildlife sanctuary located in Kannod Tehsil of Dewas district and parts of the Sehore district of Madhya Pradesh. It is spread over 132 square kilometers. It is connected to Ratapani Tiger Reserve through corridors. The dry deciduous forest consists of teak, tendu and bamboo.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Raja Bhoj Airport, Bhopal (69 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kheoni Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Barkhedi village, Vikrampur Village, Amla Village.
